title: Integration test: 16-client relay stress
description: Write a multi-client integration test that starts an in-process relay (random port, in-memory SQLite), connects 16 clients via nie_core::transport, and has each send random messages at human-speed intervals (300-3000ms). Verify every broadcast reaches all N-1 other clients. Tests relay routing correctness and concurrency without involving MLS.
close_reason: 16-client stress test passes deterministically. Root cause of previous 3-message gap was early sends before all clients connected (low-jitter clients sent to partial roster). Fix: start_barrier ensures all N clients receive DirectoryList before any sends begin, so every broadcast reaches exactly N-1 recipients.
